channel.title: SSbusinessAndMarket
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SSbusinessAndMarket, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: First major housing law since 1990s omits key fix economists say renters need
item.description: The new law streamlines environmental reviews and eases mortgage rules but leaves zoning decisions to local governments.

item.title: Inside the unheralded AI success story at logistics firm C.H. Robinson
item.description: C.H. Robinson achieved a 45% productivity gain from AI agents. CEO Dave Bozeman explains how the company found ROI.

item.title: 2.6 million Americans lost ACA coverage as subsidies expired — fraud or price shock?
item.description: CMS canceled 250,000 unauthorized enrollments; economists say the main cause is premiums that rose 58% on average.

item.title: Data centers boost jobs 4% in cities, but rural economies see little impact, study finds
item.description: The research comes as Maine Governor Janet Mills vetoes a moratorium on a $550 million data center conversion, while 10 other states consider similar bans.
